title: PLC CPU Load and Scan Cycle Degradation

compliance.assurance_rationale: Auto-migrated from cat-22 markdown on Phase 1.3 run. Requires SME review to confirm clause accuracy, mode (satisfies vs detects-violation-of), and assurance level (contributing/partial/full).

app: SNMP from OT NMS or vendor API HEC
spl:
index=ot_perf sourcetype="snmp:plc" earliest=-24h metric_name IN ("cpuUtil","scanCycleMs","taskOverload")
| timechart span=15m perc95(metric_value) by host, metric_name
| untable _time metric_series metric_value
| where metric_value>85 AND like(metric_series,"%cpuUtil%")
value: Monitors embedded controller resource metrics to catch resource exhaustion from misconfiguration or attack precursors.
implementation: (1) Poll at safe intervals; (2) baseline per process; (3) alert above threshold; (4) tie to recent downloads.
visualization: Time chart, Table (worst hosts), Single value (breach minutes).
cimSpl: | tstats summariesonly=t count from datamodel=Performance.CPU by Performance.host span=15m | sort - count
knownFalsePositives: Administrative tasks, scheduled jobs or platform updates can match this pattern — correlate with change management, maintenance windows and user role before raising severity.
